steps.title: Set up the total weight inequality
steps.content:
The person weighs 190 pounds. The freight elevator will carry x boxes at 23 pounds each and y boxes at 60 pounds each. The total weight is
$$190 + 23x + 60y$$
Since the maximum capacity is 5,450 pounds, the total weight must not exceed this limit:
$$190 + 23x + 60y \le 5,450$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the answer
steps.content:
Subtract 190 from both sides:
$$23x + 60y \le 5,450 - 190$$
$$23x + 60y \le 5,260$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
